strategy_description: EWMA (alpha=0.03) on vega-weighted quadratic IV-in-m_t smile; BS fair per strike; MM on all VEV + extract + slow hydrogel EWMA. Extract MM caused large adverse selection.
Removed standalone VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT quotes; EWMA alpha 0.045 (offline grid tradeoff); book half-spread floor in quote width; smaller hydrogel clips.
Same as v1 plus wing liquidity filter: for strikes 4000/4500/6500, if half-spread >= 8 require |mid−fair| >= 0.85*half_spread before quoting (from tape median wing spreads ~16–21 vs ATM ~3).

Pivot attempt (falsified): added aggressive selective taker leg on tight books when |edge|>=2.0 while keeping sticky EWMA smile + hydrogel MM. This overtraded near-ATM vouchers and caused large losses on days 1-2.
Conservative taker rollback: only near-ATM strikes (5000-5400), tighter spread/edge gates, smaller passive/taker sizes; still underperformed baseline sticky passive approach.
Return to v2 architecture (sticky EWMA smile + wing liquidity filter) with stricter wing edge multiplier=1.0. Performance tied with v2; prefer v2 for simpler calibrated config.
